event: The Meagre Company - Civic Guard Portrait
description: A large group portrait depicting approximately twenty men in 17th-century Dutch military attire, standing in formation before a classical architectural backdrop. The central figures wear elaborate costumes with sashes, lace collars, and plumed hats. Several carry pikes, muskets, and halberds. A flag or banner is partially visible at the left. The men display a variety of poses — some face the viewer, others turn in conversation. The palette features blacks, browns, oranges, and whites.

_meta.title: The company of Captain Reinier Reael and Lieutenant Cornelis Michielsz. Blaeuw, known as the 'Meagre Company'
